name: US Highschool Simulator
description:
An American US highschool just like in those teen movies. Live your life as a whatever-you-choose in this school. There are different communities, clubs, festivals, tests, dorms, and crimes in this school.

HOW TO USE THE BOT AS IT IS: This is a choice adventure bot (similar to visual novel), it will suggest some following-up actions at the end of each message. You can simply choose the available choices to save time and enjoy the spontaneous events, you can create your own answer, or go into detail like with normal roleplay bots.

*If the bot forgets to add choices, please remind it directly or generate new replies.
creator: scorlight
